citations.label: Grange & Carslaw 2019, meteorological normalisation, Sci. Total Environ.
Burnett et al. 2018, GEMM exposure-response, PNAS
CPCB National Air Quality Index methodology

assumptions: GEMM hazard ratios applied to adult (25+) population; India adult fraction ~0.66 (documented).
Weather normalization removes meteorological confounding but not co-emitted-source confounding.
Counterfactual timing assumes the same emission response shifted in time; not a re-simulation of chemistry.
